rawIntent:
The CI pipeline failed with the following TypeScript errors:
- src/modules/leave-api/leave.dto.ts:13 — Unable to resolve signature of property decorator when called as an expression.
- src/modules/leave-api/leave.dto.ts:10 — Unable to resolve signature of property decorator when called as an expression.
- src/modules/leave-api/leave.dto.ts:7 — Unable to resolve signature of property decorator when called as an expression.
- src/modules/leave-api/leave.dto.ts:4 — Unable to resolve signature of property decorator when called as an expression.
- src/modules/leave-api/leave.controller.ts:77 — 'request.params' is of type 'unknown'.
- src/modules/leave-api/leave.controller.ts:68 — 'request.params' is of type 'unknown'.
- src/modules/leave-api/leave.controller.ts:59 — Argument of type 'string | undefined' is not assignable to parameter of type 'string'.
- src/modules/leave-api/leave.controller.ts:59 — 'request.params' is of type 'unknown'.
- src/modules/leave-api/leave.controller.ts:47 — 'request.params' is of type 'unknown'.
- src/modules/leave-api/leave.controller.ts:35 — Argument of type 'import("/home/runner/work/trackeros/trackeros/src/modules/leave-api/leave.dto").CreateLeaveRequestDto' is not assignable to parameter of type 'import("/home/runner/work/trackeros/trackeros/src/modules/leave/leave.model").CreateLeaveRequestDto'.

The project's tsconfig.json does not have experimentalDecorators enabled, which causes the class-validator decorators in leave.dto.ts to fail compilation. Additionally, the leave controller uses FastifyRequest generic types that are not recognized by the installed Fastify version, leading to 'unknown' params and a type mismatch when passing the DTO to ILeaveManagementService.submitLeaveRequest (the service expects a CreateLeaveRequestDto from leave.model, not the class from leave.dto.ts).

Preserve all existing exports, types, interfaces, and imports. Only add or modify what is needed to resolve the CI failure shown above.

successCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation succeeds with zero errors related to the reported issues (decorator resolution, unknown params, DTO type mismatch).

constraints: Preserve all existing exports, types, interfaces, and imports.
Only add or modify what is needed to resolve the CI failure.
Do not modify the ILeaveManagementService interface or the CreateLeaveRequestDto in leave.model.
Enable experimentalDecorators in tsconfig.json to allow class-validator decorators.
Fix type errors in leave.controller.ts by using correct Fastify types and aligning the DTO import to match the service's expected parameter type.
outOfScope: Any changes to leave.dto.ts (decorator errors will be resolved by tsconfig.json change).
Modifications to leave.model, ILeaveManagementService, or any other module outside leave-api.
Adding new functionality, endpoints, or business logic.
Changes to package.json, dependencies, or other configuration files except tsconfig.json.
Any other files not explicitly mentioned in the error list.
